graphics_options: Trident CYBER9385 64-bit SVGA accelerator with 2 MB EDO DRAM

Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 2 sockets for two JEDEC 144 pin EDO SO DIMMs of 8, 16, 32 MB

display_options: 12.1" TFT SVGA color 800x600, 262,144 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast ratio

storage.hdd: 1.2 GB / 12 ms / DMA Mode 1 or PIO Mode 3 (removable), Enhanced IDE, busmaster, PCI 2.1, supports two internal disks
storage.optical: 5.25" CD-ROM, 4x speed, multi-session, XA, play with eject button, EIDE/PIO Mode 3 (ATAPI), removable

ports: 2 x Type I/II or 1 x Type III PCMCIA (CardBus 32-bit PCI)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.0, up to 115 kbs
Telephone/answering machine/full duplex speakerphone/DSVD (via Mwave DSP)
audio: Mwave MDSP2780 DSP with modem, fax, audio, telephony function (v.34 to 28.8 Kbps)
16-bit audio chip on planar with Mwave DSP
Internal stereo speakers (0.5W), slide volume control, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, automated tilt up (5.5 degrees)

physical.weight: 7.38 pounds (3.35 kg) with CD-ROM and battery

security: Security latch for keyboard and DIMMs (requires Kensington)
